Issues: Resolution and File Preparation: For high-quality printing (especially commercial use), the original file needs to be checked for sufficient resolution and appropriate color space (CMYK/RGB).
Style Consistency: While the style is appealing, ensuring consistency across multiple assets is important for branding.
IP/Copyright Check: The actual legality of selling the work depends entirely on the creator holding the copyright to this specific design, which is assumed to be the case here based on the prompt.
